curation_notes: Patch modifies one non-test source file: welcome-page-scripts.js. The fix adds a sanitize() function using DOM textContent/innerHTML to HTML-encode the return value of loggedInUserName(). No sibling files with the same vulnerability pattern exist in the directory. Pre-assigned class 'xss' confirmed — the vulnerability is a classic stored XSS via unsanitized user profile fields rendered in the account management welcome page.
